technical_debt.substitution: The report scope selector exposes Project and Per-feature scopes; the Release (run:<stamp>) scope is implemented in the /api/project/:id/report endpoint but not surfaced in the UI selector.
technical_debt.reason: The run-stamp binding (ADR-08) is a derived verify-run fingerprint, not a user-managed release entity; surfacing a run picker was deferred to keep v1 within the no-release-entity no_go_zone.

technical_debt.substitution: The pre-redesign Home + tab-based Detail components (web/src/components/ProjectCard.jsx, HomeView.jsx, views/tabs/{Summary,Traceability,Artifacts,TestCases,Bugs}Tab.jsx) remain in the tree but are no longer rendered; the old-UI e2e (tests/e2e/snapshot-card.test.js, tests/e2e/qa-workspace.test.js) are skipped with supersession pointers to the redesign's own coverage.
technical_debt.reason: Retiring another feature's shipped components/tests mid-redesign risks collateral breakage; the redesigned surfaces are fully covered by monitor.test.js + the Qa* components. Scheduled for a dedicated cleanup pass.

technical_debt.substitution: The artifact reader shows status but does not yet render approve/reject/complete action buttons inline; those actions remain via the existing admin flow.
technical_debt.reason: AC-016-5's status-appropriate actions reuse the existing approve/reject/complete surface (no_go_zone: no new artifact editing); wiring them into the reader is additive polish, not covered by a Makes-pass TC.
